artifact.environment: local development: built CLI and localhost browser server

claims.statement: The built deterministic CLI reports the managed-file drift using the canonical stable finding fields and drift summary.
After a real click, the localhost console's existing Health table renders the same acceptance-critical managed-file finding fields as the CLI.
Browser runs display a current last-run stamp and drive the top chip from drift detected to in band after the managed file is restored.
A failed browser run surfaces a generic error and removes stale green findings and verdict state without exposing the sensitive thrown path.

not_established: No production or remotely hosted deployment was exercised; the ticket scopes this console to localhost.

The drift screenshot does not place all 12 findings in one viewport; it visibly establishes the acceptance-critical managed-file row, while the named regression journey covers the complete result set.
No HTTP request/response transcript was captured, so no HTTP status-code or response-body claim is made.
A browser-initiated full or agentic run was not exercised because the accepted amendment requires browser runs to remain deterministic.

criteria.criterion: The console shows the same acceptance-critical stable finding fields that the independently run CLI printed.
criteria.evidence: EV-CLI records templates.managed/deterministic/fail and its reason; EV-DRIFT visibly renders the same four stable fields and drift summary after a real browser click.

criteria.criterion: Findings render in the existing results table and the last-run stamp is displayed.
criteria.evidence: EV-DRIFT visibly shows the existing table populated and the 2026-07-21T04:37:26.223Z latest deterministic check stamp.

criteria.criterion: The top-bar chip reflects drift detected and flips to in band after restoration and rerun.
criteria.evidence: EV-DRIFT visibly shows drift detected; EV-IN-BAND visibly shows in band with a later 2026-07-21T04:40:20.221Z stamp.

criteria.criterion: A failed run surfaces an error instead of leaving stale green findings.
criteria.evidence: EV-FAILURE visibly shows the generic alert, zero rows, health unavailable, and no current verdict; EV-FAILURE-TRANSCRIPT records one attempt, no retry, and no sensitive path in the browser.

criteria.criterion: Codified regression and repository quality gates pass.
criteria.evidence: Targeted Health Playwright artifact: 4/4. Existing thread evidence: focused Playwright 9/9, endpoint unit 6/6, full tests 6794, integration 137, plus green lint, typecheck, format, build, plugins, and manifest checks.
